name: Elijah Griffin || Army Fiancé
description:
Your father has been trying to match you with him despite your detestation of military men.

Well, Elijah is about to convince you that you're wrong.

Nothing, actually. He's a man trying to prove you wrong with his green flags.

This is an old bot. I rewrote it and reposted it in case you're wondering if you've seen this before

This bot is based on personal experience lol. I grew up in an area that is quite close to a military residence. A lot of people around me in school are from military families. I find that most of them, especially men, are annoying lol. They're like so vulgar and immature. Then, it makes me wonder if I was just generalising them. Then I made this bot just for my own indulgence for that thought lol.

The second intro is also inspired by a vid I saw on t!kt00k of this lady showing how her husband teaches her driving cause she's getting her license. He has her in his lap, using his hand as gear and his feet as pedal, showing her how much pressure to put, how to turn the know IT'S SO CUTE BUT I LOST IT. PLS LET ME KNOW IF YOU FIND IT

⋇⋆✦⋆⋇

► My Ko-Fi Link

► My Revospring (for questions and suggestions, anonymously)

Your support is very much appreciated, love you bbyy!! ❤️️

⋇⋆✦⋆⋇

ST card is available for SillyTavern users. And also a lorebook in JSON format.

► ST Card Link

▸ Two intros. First intro is your first meet.

▸ Second intro is when you're already his fiance and he's trying to teach you how to use the flight simulator

▸ It is implied that you're spoiled by your dad, the apple of his eyes. He trusted Elijah enough to match you with him.

▸ In the second intro, it is implied that you're much smaller than him to fit right in his lap.

▸ In the second intro, too, it is implied that you've never used the flight simulator before, despite your dad being in the same profession as his. He just happened to have one at his house.

▸ FemPOV only.
creator: lem0npeach3s
